**UTC−05:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of −05:00.
In North America, it is observed in the [Eastern Time Zone](/wiki/Eastern_Time_Zone "Eastern Time Zone") during [standard time](/wiki/Standard_time "Standard time"), and in the [Central Time Zone](/wiki/Central_Time_Zone "Central Time Zone") during the other eight months (see [Daylight saving time](/wiki/Daylight_saving_time "Daylight saving time")). The western [Caribbean](/wiki/Caribbean_Sea "Caribbean Sea") uses it year round.

## As standard time (Northern Hemisphere winter)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (Northern Hemisphere winter)")]

Principal cities: [New York](/wiki/New_York_City "New York City"), [Washington](/wiki/Washington,_D.C. "Washington, D.C."), [Philadelphia](/wiki/Philadelphia "Philadelphia"), [Boston](/wiki/Boston "Boston"), [Atlanta](/wiki/Atlanta "Atlanta"), [Miami](/wiki/Miami "Miami"), [Detroit](/wiki/Detroit "Detroit"), [Columbus](/wiki/Columbus,_Ohio "Columbus, Ohio"), [Baltimore](/wiki/Baltimore "Baltimore"), [Cleveland](/wiki/Cleveland "Cleveland"), [Pittsburgh](/wiki/Pittsburgh "Pittsburgh"), [Indianapolis](/wiki/Indianapolis "Indianapolis"), [Orlando](/wiki/Orlando,_Florida "Orlando, Florida"), [Charlotte](/wiki/Charlotte,_North_Carolina "Charlotte, North Carolina"), [Charleston](/wiki/Charleston,_South_Carolina "Charleston, South Carolina"), [Wilmington](/wiki/Wilmington,_North_Carolina "Wilmington, North Carolina"), [Key West](/wiki/Key_West "Key West"), [Toronto](/wiki/Toronto "Toronto"), [Montreal](/wiki/Montreal "Montreal"), [Ottawa](/wiki/Ottawa "Ottawa"), [Quebec City](/wiki/Quebec_City "Quebec City"), [Iqaluit](/wiki/Iqaluit "Iqaluit"), [Nassau](/wiki/Nassau,_Bahamas "Nassau, Bahamas"), [Havana](/wiki/Havana "Havana"), [Kingston](/wiki/Kingston,_Jamaica "Kingston, Jamaica"), [Port-au-Prince](/wiki/Port-au-Prince "Port-au-Prince"), [Cockburn Town](/wiki/Cockburn_Town "Cockburn Town"), [Providenciales](/wiki/Providenciales "Providenciales")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada ([Eastern Time Zone](/wiki/Eastern_Time_Zone "Eastern Time Zone"))
  + [Nunavut](/wiki/Nunavut "Nunavut")
    - [Qikiqtaaluk Region](/wiki/Qikiqtaaluk_Region "Qikiqtaaluk Region") except [Resolute](/wiki/Resolute,_Nunavut "Resolute, Nunavut")
  + [Ontario](/wiki/Ontario "Ontario")
    - Most of province (east of 90° W)[[1]](#cite_note-ttont-1)
  + [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec")
    - Most of province except easternmost area
* United States (Eastern Time Zone)[[2]](#cite_note-statoidus-2)
  + [Delaware](/wiki/Delaware "Delaware")
  + [District of Columbia](/wiki/District_of_Columbia "District of Columbia")
  + [Florida](/wiki/Florida "Florida")
    - Entire state except the counties of Bay, Calhoun, Escambia, Holmes, Jackson, Okaloosa, Santa Rosa, Walton, and Washington, and northern Gulf county (panhandle)
  + [Georgia](/wiki/Georgia_(U.S._state) "Georgia (U.S. state)")
  + [Indiana](/wiki/Indiana "Indiana")[[3]](#cite_note-Time_zone_map_spring-3)
    - Except the northwestern counties of [Jasper](/wiki/Jasper_County,_Indiana "Jasper County, Indiana"), [Lake](/wiki/Lake_County,_Indiana "Lake County, Indiana"), [LaPorte](/wiki/LaPorte_County,_Indiana "LaPorte County, Indiana"), [Newton](/wiki/Newton_County,_Indiana "Newton County, Indiana"), [Porter](/wiki/Porter_County,_Indiana "Porter County, Indiana") and [Starke](/wiki/Starke_County,_Indiana "Starke County, Indiana"), and the southwestern counties of [Gibson](/wiki/Gibson_County,_Indiana "Gibson County, Indiana"), [Perry](/wiki/Perry_County,_Indiana "Perry County, Indiana"), [Posey](/wiki/Posey_County,_Indiana "Posey County, Indiana"), [Spencer](/wiki/Spencer_County,_Indiana "Spencer County, Indiana"), [Vanderburgh](/wiki/Vanderburgh_County,_Indiana "Vanderburgh County, Indiana") and [Warrick](/wiki/Warrick_County,_Indiana "Warrick County, Indiana")
  + [Kentucky](/wiki/Kentucky "Kentucky")
    - Counties to the east of (not including) the counties of [Breckinridge](/wiki/Breckinridge_County,_Kentucky "Breckinridge County, Kentucky"), [Grayson](/wiki/Grayson_County,_Kentucky "Grayson County, Kentucky"), [Hart](/wiki/Hart_County,_Kentucky "Hart County, Kentucky"), [Green](/wiki/Green_County,_Kentucky "Green County, Kentucky"), [Adair](/wiki/Adair_County,_Kentucky "Adair County, Kentucky"), [Russell](/wiki/Russell_County,_Kentucky "Russell County, Kentucky") and [Clinton](/wiki/Clinton_County,_Kentucky "Clinton County, Kentucky")[[2]](#cite_note-statoidus-2)
  + [Maine](/wiki/Maine "Maine")
  + [Maryland](/wiki/Maryland "Maryland")
  + [Michigan](/wiki/Michigan "Michigan")[[4]](#cite_note-ttmich-4)
    - Except the western counties of [Dickinson](/wiki/Dickinson_County,_Michigan "Dickinson County, Michigan"), [Gogebic](/wiki/Gogebic_County,_Michigan "Gogebic County, Michigan"), [Iron](/wiki/Iron_County,_Michigan "Iron County, Michigan") and [Menominee](/wiki/Menominee_County,_Michigan "Menominee County, Michigan")
  + [New England](/wiki/New_England "New England") (states of [Connecticut](/wiki/Connecticut "Connecticut"), [Massachusetts](/wiki/Massachusetts "Massachusetts"), [Maine](/wiki/Maine "Maine"), [New Hampshire](/wiki/New_Hampshire "New Hampshire"), [Rhode Island](/wiki/Rhode_Island "Rhode Island") and [Vermont](/wiki/Vermont "Vermont"))[[2]](#cite_note-statoidus-2)
  + [New Jersey](/wiki/New_Jersey "New Jersey")
  + [New York](/wiki/New_York_(state) "New York (state)")
  + [North Carolina](/wiki/North_Carolina "North Carolina")
  + [Ohio](/wiki/Ohio "Ohio")
  + [Pennsylvania](/wiki/Pennsylvania "Pennsylvania")
  + [South Carolina](/wiki/South_Carolina "South Carolina")
  + [Tennessee](/wiki/Tennessee "Tennessee")
    - The counties of [Scott](/wiki/Scott_County,_Tennessee "Scott County, Tennessee"), [Morgan](/wiki/Morgan_County,_Tennessee "Morgan County, Tennessee"), [Roane](/wiki/Roane_County,_Tennessee "Roane County, Tennessee"), [Rhea](/wiki/Rhea_County,_Tennessee "Rhea County, Tennessee") and [Hamilton](/wiki/Hamilton_County,_Tennessee "Hamilton County, Tennessee"), and all counties to the east of these[[2]](#cite_note-statoidus-2)
  + [Virginia](/wiki/Virginia "Virginia")
  + [West Virginia](/wiki/West_Virginia "West Virginia")

### Caribbean

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Caribbean")]

* Bahamas
* Cuba
* Haiti
* Navassa Island
* United Kingdom
  + [Turks and Caicos Islands](/wiki/Turks_and_Caicos_Islands "Turks and Caicos Islands")

## As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)")]

Principal cities: [Winnipeg](/wiki/Winnipeg "Winnipeg"), [Chicago](/wiki/Chicago "Chicago"), [Dallas](/wiki/Dallas "Dallas"), [Houston](/wiki/Houston "Houston"), [St. Louis](/wiki/St._Louis "St. Louis"), [Minneapolis](/wiki/Minneapolis "Minneapolis"), [Austin](/wiki/Austin,_Texas "Austin, Texas"), [Memphis](/wiki/Memphis,_Tennessee "Memphis, Tennessee"), [Kansas City](/wiki/Kansas_City "Kansas City"), [San Antonio](/wiki/San_Antonio "San Antonio"), [Nashville](/wiki/Nashville "Nashville"), [New Orleans](/wiki/New_Orleans "New Orleans"), [Milwaukee](/wiki/Milwaukee "Milwaukee"), [Oklahoma City](/wiki/Oklahoma_City "Oklahoma City"), [Reynosa](/wiki/Reynosa "Reynosa")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada ([Central Time Zone](/wiki/Central_Time_Zone "Central Time Zone"))
  + [Manitoba](/wiki/Manitoba "Manitoba")
  + Nunavut
    - All of [Kivalliq Region](/wiki/Kivalliq_Region "Kivalliq Region") ([Coral Harbour](/wiki/Coral_Harbour,_Nunavut "Coral Harbour, Nunavut"))
  + Ontario
    - West of 90° west longitude[[1]](#cite_note-ttont-1)
* Mexico (near US border with Texas)
  + [Chihuahua](/wiki/Chihuahua_(state) "Chihuahua (state)")
    - The municipalities of [Coyame del Sotol](/wiki/Coyame_del_Sotol "Coyame del Sotol"), [Ojinaga](/wiki/Ojinaga_Municipality "Ojinaga Municipality") and [Manuel Benavides](/wiki/Manuel_Benavides_Municipality "Manuel Benavides Municipality")[[5]](#cite_note-cenam-5)
  + [Coahuila de Zaragoza](/wiki/Coahuila_de_Zaragoza "Coahuila de Zaragoza")
    - The municipalities of [Acuña](/wiki/Acu%C3%B1a_Municipality "Acuña Municipality"), [Allende](/wiki/Allende_Municipality,_Coahuila "Allende Municipality, Coahuila"), [Guerrero](/wiki/Guerrero_Municipality,_Coahuila "Guerrero Municipality, Coahuila"), [Hidalgo](/wiki/Hidalgo_Municipality,_Coahuila "Hidalgo Municipality, Coahuila"), [Jiménez](/wiki/Jim%C3%A9nez_Municipality,_Coahuila "Jiménez Municipality, Coahuila"), [Morelos](/wiki/Morelos_Municipality,_Coahuila "Morelos Municipality, Coahuila"), [Nava](/wiki/Nava_Municipality "Nava Municipality"), [Ocampo](/wiki/Ocampo_Municipality,_Coahuila "Ocampo Municipality, Coahuila"), [Piedras Negras](/wiki/Piedras_Negras_Municipality "Piedras Negras Municipality"), [Villa Unión](/wiki/Villa_Uni%C3%B3n_Municipality "Villa Unión Municipality") and [Zaragoza](/wiki/Zaragoza_Municipality,_Coahuila "Zaragoza Municipality, Coahuila")
  + [Nuevo León](/wiki/Nuevo_Le%C3%B3n "Nuevo León")
    - The municipality of [Anahuac](/wiki/An%C3%A1huac_Municipality "Anáhuac Municipality")
  + [Tamaulipas](/wiki/Tamaulipas "Tamaulipas")
    - The municipalities of [Nuevo Laredo](/wiki/Nuevo_Laredo_Municipality "Nuevo Laredo Municipality"), [Guerrero](/wiki/Guerrero_Municipality,_Tamaulipas "Guerrero Municipality, Tamaulipas"), [Mier](/wiki/Mier_Municipality "Mier Municipality"), [Miguel Alemán](/wiki/Miguel_Alem%C3%A1n_Municipality "Miguel Alemán Municipality"), [Camargo](/wiki/Camargo_Municipality,_Tamaulipas "Camargo Municipality, Tamaulipas"), [Gustavo Díaz Ordaz](/wiki/Gustavo_D%C3%ADaz_Ordaz,_Tamaulipas "Gustavo Díaz Ordaz, Tamaulipas"), [Reynosa](/wiki/Reynosa_Municipality "Reynosa Municipality"), [Río Bravo](/wiki/R%C3%ADo_Bravo_Municipality "Río Bravo Municipality"), [Valle Hermoso](/wiki/Valle_Hermoso_Municipality "Valle Hermoso Municipality") and [Matamoros](/wiki/Matamoros_Municipality,_Tamaulipas "Matamoros Municipality, Tamaulipas")
* United States (Central Time Zone)
  + [Alabama](/wiki/Alabama "Alabama")
    - entire state except [Phenix City](/wiki/Phenix_City,_Alabama "Phenix City, Alabama")
  + [Arkansas](/wiki/Arkansas "Arkansas")
  + Florida[[2]](#cite_note-statoidus-2)
    - The counties of Bay, Calhoun, Escambia, Holmes, Jackson, Okaloosa, Santa Rosa, Walton, and Washington, and northern Gulf county (panhandle)
  + [Illinois](/wiki/Illinois "Illinois")
  + Indiana[[3]](#cite_note-Time_zone_map_spring-3)
    - Northwestern counties of [Jasper](/wiki/Jasper_County,_Indiana "Jasper County, Indiana"), [Lake](/wiki/Lake_County,_Indiana "Lake County, Indiana"), [LaPorte](/wiki/LaPorte_County,_Indiana "LaPorte County, Indiana"), [Newton](/wiki/Newton_County,_Indiana "Newton County, Indiana"), [Porter](/wiki/Porter_County,_Indiana "Porter County, Indiana") and [Starke](/wiki/Starke_County,_Indiana "Starke County, Indiana")
    - Southwestern counties of [Gibson](/wiki/Gibson_County,_Indiana "Gibson County, Indiana"), [Perry](/wiki/Perry_County,_Indiana "Perry County, Indiana"), [Posey](/wiki/Posey_County,_Indiana "Posey County, Indiana"), [Spencer](/wiki/Spencer_County,_Indiana "Spencer County, Indiana"), [Vanderburgh](/wiki/Vanderburgh_County,_Indiana "Vanderburgh County, Indiana") and [Warrick](/wiki/Warrick_County,_Indiana "Warrick County, Indiana")
  + [Iowa](/wiki/Iowa "Iowa")
  + [Kansas](/wiki/Kansas "Kansas")
    - Entire state except westernmost counties
  + Kentucky
    - The counties of Breckinridge, Grayson, Hart, Green, Adair, Russell and Clinton, and all counties to the west of these[[2]](#cite_note-statoidus-2)[[6]](#cite_note-kentmap-6)
  + [Louisiana](/wiki/Louisiana "Louisiana")
  + Michigan[[4]](#cite_note-ttmich-4)
    - The western counties of Dickinson, Gogebic, Iron and Menominee
  + [Minnesota](/wiki/Minnesota "Minnesota")
  + [Mississippi](/wiki/Mississippi "Mississippi")
  + [Missouri](/wiki/Missouri "Missouri")
  + [Nebraska](/wiki/Nebraska "Nebraska")
    - Central and eastern [Nebraska](/wiki/Nebraska "Nebraska")
  + [North Dakota](/wiki/North_Dakota "North Dakota")
    - Entire state except southwest
  + [Oklahoma](/wiki/Oklahoma "Oklahoma")
    - Entire state except [Kenton](/wiki/Kenton,_Oklahoma "Kenton, Oklahoma")
  + [South Dakota](/wiki/South_Dakota "South Dakota")
    - Eastern half
  + [Tennessee](/wiki/Tennessee "Tennessee")
    - Counties to the west of the counties of Scott, Morgan, Roane, Rhea, and Hamilton[[2]](#cite_note-statoidus-2)[[7]](#cite_note-tennmap-7)
  + [Texas](/wiki/Texas "Texas")
    - All except westernmost counties
  + [Wisconsin](/wiki/Wisconsin "Wisconsin")

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

Principal cities: [Cancún](/wiki/Canc%C3%BAn "Cancún"), [Bogotá](/wiki/Bogot%C3%A1 "Bogotá"), [Lima](/wiki/Lima "Lima"), [Kingston](/wiki/Kingston,_Jamaica "Kingston, Jamaica"), [Quito](/wiki/Quito "Quito"), [Panama City](/wiki/Panama_City "Panama City"), [George Town](/wiki/George_Town,_Cayman_Islands "George Town, Cayman Islands")

### South America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: South America")]

* Brazil[[8]](#cite_note-8)
  + [Acre](/wiki/Acre_(state) "Acre (state)")
  + [Amazonas](/wiki/Amazonas_(Brazilian_state) "Amazonas (Brazilian state)") (13 western municipalities, approximately marked by a line between [Tabatinga](/wiki/Tabatinga "Tabatinga") and [Porto Acre](/wiki/Porto_Acre "Porto Acre"))
* Colombia – [Time in Colombia](/wiki/Time_in_Colombia "Time in Colombia")
* Ecuador – [Time in Ecuador](/wiki/Time_in_Ecuador "Time in Ecuador") (except [Galápagos Islands](/wiki/Gal%C3%A1pagos_Islands "Galápagos Islands"))
* Peru – [Time in Peru](/wiki/Time_in_Peru "Time in Peru")

* United Kingdom
  + [British Overseas Territories](/wiki/British_Overseas_Territories "British Overseas Territories")
    - [Cayman Islands](/wiki/Cayman_Islands "Cayman Islands")
* United States
  + [United States Minor Outlying Islands](/wiki/United_States_Minor_Outlying_Islands "United States Minor Outlying Islands")
    - [Navassa Island](/wiki/Navassa_Island "Navassa Island")[[9]](#cite_note-9)

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9205:00&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada – [Eastern Time Zone](/wiki/Eastern_Time_Zone "Eastern Time Zone")
  + [Atikokan](/wiki/Atikokan "Atikokan") and [New Osnaburgh](/wiki/Mishkeegogamang_First_Nation "Mishkeegogamang First Nation")/[Pickle Lake](/wiki/Pickle_Lake "Pickle Lake") area
  + [Southampton Island](/wiki/Southampton_Island "Southampton Island")
* Mexico (Zona Sureste)
  + [Quintana Roo](/wiki/Quintana_Roo "Quintana Roo")[[5]](#cite_note-cenam-5)
* Panama
